title: Regulation Knowledge File
description: JSON Schema for BABOK Analyst regulation knowledge files. Defines structure for regulatory frameworks, compliance checklists, and penalty information.

regulation.description: Full official name of the regulation (e.g., 'General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)')

jurisdiction.description: Geographic scope and applicability (country, region, or international)

description.description: Narrative overview of the regulation including effective date, key principles, and who it applies to

requirements.description: Individual compliance requirements derived from the regulation

description.description: Detailed description of what is required and how to comply

mandatory.description: Whether this requirement is mandatory (true) or conditional/optional (false)

checklist.description: Practical compliance checklist items for implementation teams

penalties.description: Description of penalties and consequences for non-compliance
